summary: Driver Review/Rating System - Complete E2E Testing. All 14 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI flows verified working including login, review form validation, review submission, profile stats display, and existing review display.

backend_tests.get_nonexistent_review: PASS - GET returns 404 for unreviewed ride
backend_tests.get_partner_review_stats: PASS - Stats endpoint returns average, total, breakdown
backend_tests.ride_with_review_flag: PASS - Reviewed ride has reviewed=True flag

frontend_tests.driver_login: PASS - Login page loads, form submits, redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.dashboard_star_ratings: PASS - Completed rides show star ratings (3, 4, 5 stars visible)
frontend_tests.dashboard_review_prompt: PASS - 'Avis requis' badge shown for unreviewed completed rides
frontend_tests.navigate_to_unreviewed_ride: PASS - Review form visible on completed ride without review
frontend_tests.validation_0_stars: PASS - Submit button disabled when no stars selected
frontend_tests.validation_3_stars_no_comment: PASS - Red error message 'obligatoire' shown, red border on textarea
frontend_tests.submit_valid_review: PASS - 4 stars + comment 'Bon chauffeur, rapide' submitted successfully
frontend_tests.review_form_replaced: PASS - Form replaced by 'Votre Avis' section after submission
frontend_tests.profile_page_stats: PASS - Shows average rating 4, 3 total reviews, rating breakdown chart
frontend_tests.profile_page_review_cards: PASS - Individual review cards displayed with date and comment
frontend_tests.reviewed_ride_no_form: PASS - Review form NOT shown for already-reviewed ride
frontend_tests.reviewed_ride_shows_existing: PASS - Existing review displayed with stars, comment, timestamp

critical_code_review_comments: All review endpoints properly secured with partner JWT authentication
Comment validation correctly enforced: mandatory for ratings 1-4, optional for 5 stars
Review stats calculation includes average, total, and per-rating breakdown
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements (star-1 through star-5, review-form, review-comment, submit-review, existing-review, review-stats)
Dark theme UI has good contrast and readability
French language throughout the driver PWA is consistent
seed_data_creation: One review created during testing: 4 stars with comment 'Bon chauffeur, rapide' for ride 20bbedeb-3521-4da9-beac-ebe80e69e8e6
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver review/rating system fully tested and working. Current state: 3 reviews in the system (3-star, 4-star, 5-star). All completed rides now have reviews. Profile page shows review stats correctly. Dashboard shows star ratings on reviewed rides. Review validation working for both frontend and backend.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are live - no mocked endpoints
